field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 1
field.label: Herreria

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 2
field.label: Chaperia

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 3
field.label: Pintura

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 4
field.label: PRFV

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 5
field.label: Terminacion

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 6
field.label: Ingenieria De Producto

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 7
field.label: Desarrollo y Diseño

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 9
field.label: Mecanica

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 10
field.label: Mantenimiento

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 11
field.label: Electricidad

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 13
field.label: Limpieza

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 14
field.label: Almacen

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 20
field.label: Titular

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 21
field.label: Direccion de Ventas y Administracion

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 22
field.label: Direccion de Recursos Humanos

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 23
field.label: Direccion de Produccion

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 24
field.label: Dep. Contabilidad y Finanzas

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 25
field.label: Dep. Administracion

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 26
field.label: Dep. Compras

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 27
field.label: Dep. Produccion

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 28
field.label: Dep. Ingenieria

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 29
field.label: Dep. Higiene Seguridad y Mantenimiento

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 30
field.label: Sistemas y Comunicaciones

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 31
field.label: Cuentas Proveedores

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 35
field.label: PostVenta y Reparaciones

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 36
field.label: Controles Calidad y Preentrega

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 38
field.label: Dep. Seguimiento y Control Del Producto

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 39
field.label: Recepcion Materiales

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 40
field.label: Mejora del Producto

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 42
field.label: Corte y plegado

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 43
field.label: Herreria Minibus

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 44
field.label: Chaperia Minibus

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 45
field.label: Dep Produccion Minibus

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 46
field.label: PRFV Minibus

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 47
field.label: Pintura Minibus

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 48
field.label: Terminacion Minibus

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 49
field.label: Electricidad Minibus

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 50
field.label: Mecanica Minibus

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 51
field.label: Gestion de Calidad

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 52
field.label: Desarrollo Proveedores

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 53
field.label: Dep. Asientos

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 54
field.label: Herreria Asi.

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 56
field.label: Resp.Direccion

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 57
field.label: Accesorios

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 58
field.label: Calefaccion

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 59
field.label: Autopartes

field.label: Ing.Procesos

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 61
field.label: Costura Asi.

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 62
field.label: Tapiceria Asi.

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 63
field.label: Armado Asi.

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 64
field.label: Ventanas

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 66
field.label: Métodos y Tiempos

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 68
field.label: Calidad Procesos y Proveedores

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 69
field.label: Medio Ambiente, Higiene y Seguridad

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 70
field.label: Nuevos equipamientos / procesos

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 71
field.label: Clientes

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 72
field.label: Representante de la Dirección

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 73
field.label: Aire Acondicionado

field.label: Licencias

field.expression: SELECT polivalencianivel_id FROM RH_POLIVALENCIAS WHERE RH_POLIVALENCIAS.IdPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and RH_POLIVALENCIAS.seccion_id = 75
field.label: Gestión del Capital Humano

field.label: Estandarización

field.label: Definicion Producto
